After that, Thomas saw Leslie at the bakery from 11am to 4pm buying cookies. Then Ashley saw Leslie at the electronics store fixing their computer from 4pm to 5pm. Finally, Susan saw Leslie walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. Also, the beach was closed after 10pm. The question is asking between what times Leslie could have gone to the beach. The options are A) 5pm to 9pm, B) 9am to 11am, C) 9pm to 10pm, D) 4pm to 5pm.
